title: Alligator Sonic Prime Sticker Book with Lots of Reusable Stickers Inside Bouns Stand-Up Character On The Back Cover|Fun and Play Activity Books|Perfect for Travel, Birthday Gifts for Kids|Age 3+
features: EXCITING SONIC ADVENTURES: Immerse yourself in the world of Sonic with our Sonic Prime Sticker Book! Perfect for fans of all ages, it's a treasure trove of fun featuring everyone's favorite hedgehog.
BONUS STAND-UP CHARACTER: Enhance playtime with the book's unique feature - a bonus stand-up character on the back cover! Bring Sonic and his friends to life in your imaginative play scenarios.

OVER 50 REUSABLE STICKERS: Dive into creativity with "lots of reusable stickers inside!" This sticker book allows kids to customize scenes, craft stories, and express their love for Sonic in countless ways.

COLOURING PAGES: Get ready to unleash your inner artist with additional thrilling coloring pages that transform this book into an all-round experience! With 11 pages to colour, you will be entertained for hours!

THE ULTIMATE SONIC GIFT: Searching for the perfect Sonic the Hedgehog gifts? Look no further! This sticker activity book is a delightful present for birthdays, holidays, or any occasion for Sonic enthusiasts!
description: Product Description Dive into the high-speed world of Sonic with ALLIGATOR's Sonic Prime Sticker Book! Bursting with excitement, this book features loads of reusable stickers showcasing everyone's favorite blue hedgehog and his friends. But that's not all! Flip to the back cover, and you'll discover a bonus stand-up character waiting to join the adventure. Whether you're creating your own Sonic scenes or decorating notebooks and gadgets, the fun never ends. Perfect for Sonic enthusiasts and sticker lovers alike, this activity book offers endless hours of creative play and imagination. Get ready to spin, dash, and sticker your way through Sonic's universe! Safety Warning Warning! Small Parts, Choking Hazard.
